Description: Survey Plan Development and Owner Approval
SourceSection: Step 1 — Develop and Submit Survey Plan
Notes: Includes scope definition; datum/accuracy/methodology documentation; QA/QC approach; coordination with DEL-008-01; Owner submission and approval cycle per R-009

SourceSection: Step 2 — Mobilize and Establish Control Network
Notes: Confirm geodetic control; set primary and working control points; closure check per R-007; document coordinates. Includes travel/mobilization to SW 14-44-21-W4
Collect ground elevations across project area; breaklines; features. Coverage must support grading design per RFP §3.4
Establish or confirm property boundaries per R-003. May require ALS involvement per Alberta Land Surveyors Act. Scope extent TBD with Owner
Document existing structures; services; access roads; site features per R-004. Includes monument identification per R-013
Process field observations; adjust control network; generate topographic surface model; QA/QC per R-012; prepare digital files per R-008
Produce topographic drawing(s) showing contours; features; control points; boundaries; datum notes. PDF and native CAD format
Written report documenting methodology; control network; accuracy assessment; QA/QC results; existing conditions; deliverable list per R-008

Description: Digital Data File Preparation and Delivery
SourceSection: Step 7 — Deliver Artifacts and Obtain Acceptance
Notes: Assemble deliverable package; format per R-008; submit to Owner and design team; support review cycle; obtain written acceptance
PM oversight of survey deliverable. Hours from Level_of_Effort.csv (R-01; 6 hr)
Cost estimator support. Hours from Level_of_Effort.csv (R-08; 4 hr)

Description: Health and Safety Plan — Field Survey
Notes: Site-specific HSE requirements for active landfill per Lensing A-004; site induction; PPE; emergency procedures

SourceSection: Data Backup and Security During Field Operations
Notes: Daily backup of raw field data; secure storage; integrity confirmation per Lensing X-001. Included in surveyor field effort
